name: Classic Margherita Pizza
directions: Preheat oven to 250°C (482°F) with a baking stone if available.
Roll out dough to a 12-inch circle on a floured surface.
Spread tomato sauce evenly over dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
Scatter mozzarella cheese over sauce.
Bake on the stone for 10-12 minutes until crust is crisp and cheese melts.
Finish with basil leaves, drizzle with olive oil, and season with salt and optional parmesan.
Slice and serve immediately.
image_description: The image depicts a Classic Margherita Pizza, characterized by its thin crust, cooked to a golden brown with visible char marks, and topped with tomato sauce, melted mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil leaves. The pizza is presented on a wooden serving board, cut into four slices with one slice partially pulled away from the rest, and accompanied by a small bowl of marinara sauce and a bottle of olive oil in the background. The overall presentation suggests a casual yet appetizing dining experience.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
ingredients: 1 cup heavy cream or coconut cream
directions: Marinate chicken in yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin, coriander, and a pinch of salt for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat oil and sauté onion until translucent.
Add garlic and ginger; cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add marinated chicken; cook until browned on all sides.
Stir in crushed tomatoes and simmer 15 minutes.
Reduce heat and add cream; simmer 5-10 minutes until sauce thickens.
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice or naan.
image_description:
The image depicts a dish of Chicken Tikka Masala, a popular Indian-inspired recipe. 
The main ingredients visible are chicken pieces cooked in a rich, creamy tomato-based sauce, garnished with fresh cilantro and served with basmati rice and naan bread. 
The portion size appears to be generous, suitable for one or two people, and is presented in a decorative metal bowl on a slate platter, suggesting a restaurant or special occasion setting.

name: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu
directions: Toss tofu with soy sauce and cornstarch.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Fry tofu until golden; remove and set aside.
Add garlic and vegetables; stir-fry 3-4 minutes until crisp-tender.
Return tofu to pan; add rice vinegar, hoisin sauce, and sesame oil.
Cook 1-2 minutes until coated; serve with steamed rice.
image_description: The image depicts a Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu, showcasing a harmonious blend of ingredients. The dish features a medley of broccoli, carrots, snap peas, and tofu, all stir-fried in a savory sauce and served over a bed of rice. The presentation is simple yet appetizing, with the stir-fry served in a white bowl alongside a small bowl of white rice and a pair of chopsticks on the side.

name: Greek Giouvertsa Salad with Lemon-Oregano Dressing
directions: Toss romaine, cucumber, tomatoes, onion, olives, and feta in a bowl.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper to make dressing.
Pour dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Serve immediately.
image_description: The image depicts a large white bowl filled with a Greek salad, comprising romaine lettuce, halved cherry tomatoes, sliced cucumbers, red onions, Kalamata olives, and crumbled feta cheese. The salad is presented on a wooden table, accompanied by a silver serving spoon and surrounded by a small glass bowl of dressing, a lemon wedge, and a blue-and-white striped cloth napkin. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting that the salad is intended to serve multiple people.

name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
directions: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente; reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Heat olive oil in a pan; add garlic and red pepper flakes, cook until fragrant and lightly golden.
Toss pasta with garlic oil, adding reserve water as needed.
Season, mix in parsley, and serve with parmesan.
image_description:
The image depicts a bowl of Spaghetti Aglio e Olio, a traditional Italian pasta dish. 
The visible ingredients include spaghetti, garlic, red pepper flakes, parsley, and parmesan cheese, indicating that the spaghetti has been cooked al dente and tossed with sautéed garlic and chili flakes, then topped with grated parmesan and parsley. 
The presentation style is simple yet elegant, with the pasta served in a white bowl on a wooden table, accompanied by a fork and a small bowl of red pepper flakes, suggesting a generous portion size suitable for one person.

name: Distance-Glazed Salmon with Dill
directions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Mix honey, soy sauce, mustard, and dill.
Season salmon with salt and pepper; brush with glaze.
Bake 10-12 minutes until flaky; drizzle remaining glaze over and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a glazed salmon fillet, garnished with fresh dill and spices, presented on a wooden cutting board. The salmon is cooked to perfection and sliced into thick portions, accompanied by a fork and a small glass bowl of glaze in the background. The dish is elegantly styled, with lemon wedges and herbs adding a pop of color and freshness to the presentation.

name: Tomato Basil Soup
directions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
Add crushed tomatoes and broth; simmer 15 minutes.
Blend until smooth or leave chunky based on preference.
Stir in cream and basil; season to taste and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant bowl of Tomato Basil Soup, garnished with fresh basil leaves and surrounded by an assortment of ingredients, including tomatoes, garlic, olive oil, and spices. The soup is presented in a light blue ceramic bowl, accompanied by a recipe that outlines the preparation method, which involves sautéing onions and garlic, then blending cooked tomatoes with cream or yogurt. The portion size appears to be a single serving, likely intended for one person.

name: Pad Thai
ingredients: 1 tablespoon palm sugar or brown sugar
directions: Prepare noodles according to package; drain and set aside.
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar to make sauce.
Sauté garlic in oil; add shrimp or chicken and cook through.
Push meat aside, scramble eggs in the pan, then mix with noodles.
Add sauce and bean sprouts; toss quickly.
Garnish with peanuts, lime wedges, and chili flakes if desired.
image_description:
The image depicts a plate of Pad Thai, a stir-fry dish made with rice noodles, shrimp, and various vegetables. 
The dish is presented on a large, shallow ceramic plate with a brown rim, garnished with green onions and a lime wedge, and features a generous portion size. 
The cooking method appears to be stir-frying, as evidenced by the mixed ingredients and the presence of seasonings and garnishes around the plate.

name: Chickpea Falafel with Tahini
ingredients: Tahini sauce: 1/4 cup tahini, lemon juice, water
directions: Pulse chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, flour, and spices until coarse.
Form into small patties or balls.
Fry in hot oil until golden and crisp.
Whisk tahini with lemon juice and water to desired consistency.
Serve falafel with tahini sauce.
image_description: The image presents a visually appealing dish of Chickpea Falafel, accompanied by a recipe and various ingredients. The falafel is arranged on a plate with sliced onions, lemon, and parsley, showcasing a crispy exterior and a golden-brown color, indicating that it has been pan-fried. The portion size appears to be generous, with six pieces of falafel served alongside complementary ingredients such as tahini sauce, chickpeas, and spices.

name: Beef Tacos with Salsa Verde
directions: Cook beef with taco seasoning until browned.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet.
Fill tortillas with beef, lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese.
Top with salsa verde and sour cream if desired.
image_description: The image depicts four beef tacos with salsa verde, presented on a blue plate. The tacos are filled with seasoned ground beef, shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheese, sour cream, and salsa verde, all wrapped in yellow corn tortillas. The portion size is moderate, with four tacos served together, accompanied by various toppings and condiments in the background, including salsa, sour cream, and shredded cheese.

name: Pan-Seared Ribeye Steak
directions: Season steaks with salt and pepper.
Sear in a hot pan with butter until desired doneness (about 4-5 minutes per side for medium-rare).
Add garlic and thyme during the last minute, spooning butter over steaks.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.
image_description: The image depicts a pan-seared ribeye steak, cooked to medium-rare and presented in a cast-iron skillet with fresh thyme sprigs and butter. The steak is seasoned with peppercorns and salt, and the skillet is surrounded by various seasonings and ingredients, including coarse salt, peppercorns, garlic cloves, and olive oil. The presentation is rustic and appetizing, suggesting a hearty and flavorful meal for one person.

name: Lentil Dal with Cumin and Turmeric
directions: Rinse lentils until water runs clear.
Sauté onion and garlic in oil until soft.
Add cumin and turmeric, cook 1 minute.
Add lentils and water; simmer 20-25 minutes until soft.
Season and garnish with cilantro.
image_description:
The image depicts a bowl of Lentil Dal with Cumin and Turmeric, garnished with fresh cilantro, onions, tomatoes, and a slice of lime. 
The dish is presented in a ceramic bowl on a beige cloth napkin, accompanied by a spoon to the right and surrounded by various ingredients such as turmeric powder, garlic, and an onion. 
The portion size appears to be a single serving, likely intended for one person.

name: Miso-Glazed Cod with Sesame Rice
ingredients: Sesame seeds and green onions for garnish
directions: Whisk miso, mirin, soy sauce, and sugar to make glaze.
Brush cod with glaze and let sit 5 minutes.
Pan-sear or bake cod until flaky.
Fluff rice with sesame oil, top with cod, sesame seeds, and green onions.
image_description: The image depicts a dish of Miso-Glazed Cod with Sesame Rice, presented in a large ceramic bowl on a blue napkin. The cod is glazed with a rich miso sauce and served atop a bed of white rice, garnished with sesame seeds and chopped scallions. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting a satisfying and filling meal.

name: Caribbean Jerk Chicken
directions: Marinate chicken with jerk seasoning, lime juice, olive oil, and salt for 20 minutes.
Grill or bake until cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Rest briefly and serve with sides like rice and beans.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing Caribbean Jerk Chicken dish, featuring four roasted chicken legs garnished with fresh lime wedges and herbs on a wooden platter. The accompanying sides include rice, beans, salt, and a flavorful sauce or stew, all presented in small terracotta bowls. The overall presentation is rustic and inviting, with a generous portion size that suggests a hearty and satisfying meal.

name: Roasted Tomato and Basil Pasta
directions: Roast tomatoes and garlic with olive oil for 15-20 minutes.
Cook pasta until al dente, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Toss pasta with roasted tomatoes, add water to loosen if needed.
Stir in torn basil and parmesan; season to taste.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of penne pasta tossed with roasted cherry tomatoes and fresh basil, presented on a rustic ceramic plate. The dish is garnished with shaved Parmesan cheese and black pepper, suggesting a simple yet flavorful preparation method involving roasting the tomatoes to bring out their natural sweetness. The generous portion size and artful arrangement of ingredients on the plate indicate a satisfying and visually appealing meal.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
directions: Fry paneer lightly until golden; set aside.
Sauté onion with butter, add ginger-garlic paste.
Add tomato puree and simmer 10 minutes.
Stir in cream, garam masala, and paneer; simmer 5 minutes.
Season to taste and serve with rice or naan.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of Paneer Butter Masala, a popular Indian curry. The main ingredients visible are paneer (Indian cheese), onions, and a rich tomato-based sauce, garnished with fresh herbs; the cooking method appears to be simmering or braising, as evidenced by the tender paneer and the thick, creamy sauce. The presentation is elegant, with the dish served in a large bowl surrounded by naan bread, rice, and various spices, suggesting a generous portion size suitable for sharing or a hearty individual serving.

name: Falooda (Dessert Drink)
ingredients: Cherries or shredded coconut for garnish
directions: In tall glasses, layer milk, rose syrup, soaked vermicelli, and sabja.
Add ice and garnish with cherries or coconut.
Serve with a spoon and straw.
image_description:
The image depicts a dessert drink, likely Falooda, presented in two tall glasses on a marble slab. 
The dessert features layers of vermicelli noodles, red jelly, and white cream, topped with whipped cream, cherries, and mint leaves, and is garnished with decorative spoons. 
The portion size appears to be generous, with the glasses filled to the brim and accompanied by additional ingredients such as rose petals, ice cubes, and flavored powders on the side.

name: Shakshuka
directions: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil until soft.
Add garlic, tomatoes, paprika, and cumin; simmer 10 minutes.
Make four wells in sauce and crack in eggs.
Cover and cook until eggs set; garnish with parsley.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant Shakshuka dish, characterized by its rich colors and enticing presentation. The main ingredients visible in the image are eggs, bell peppers, onions, tomatoes, and spices, which are cooked together in a cast-iron skillet. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting that it is intended to serve multiple people.

name: Cuban Black Beans and Rice
ingredients: 1 cup dried black beans (or 2 cans, drained)
directions: Soak beans if using dried (overnight recommended).
Sauté onion and garlic in oil; add beans, bay leaf, cumin, and water.
Simmer until beans are tender (about 45 minutes for dried).
Serve over rice.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of Cuban Black Beans and Rice, showcasing the preparation process through a series of illustrations. The finished dish features a generous serving of white rice surrounded by a rich, dark bean stew, garnished with sliced garlic and fresh herbs on a large white plate. The portion size appears to be substantial, suggesting a hearty and satisfying meal.

name: Beef Bulgogi
ingredients: 500g sirloin or flank steak, thinly sliced
directions: Marinate beef with soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger for 15-20 minutes.
Stir-fry in a hot pan 2-3 minutes until cooked.
Garnish with green onion and sesame seeds; serve with rice.
image_description: The image depicts a dish of Beef Bulgogi, a popular Korean marinated beef dish. The beef is sliced into thin strips and cooked to medium-rare, served on a bed of onions and garnished with green onions and sesame seeds, presented in a large bowl. The portion size appears generous, accompanied by various condiments and ingredients such as rice, garlic, and spices, suggesting a flavorful and savory meal.

name: Spanish Paella Valenciana
directions: Brown chicken and chorizo in olive oil; set aside.
Sauté onion and pepper; add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add rice, saffron, and broth; bring to boil.
Return meat, cover, simmer until rice is cooked and liquid absorbed.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.
image_description: The image depicts a traditional Spanish Paella Valenciana, characterized by its vibrant yellow rice, succulent chicken, and an assortment of vegetables, including tomatoes and onions. The dish is presented in a large, shallow pan with two handles, showcasing a generous portion size suitable for multiple servings. The cooking method appears to be pan-frying or sautéing, as evidenced by the golden-brown color of the chicken and the slightly caramelized vegetables.

name: Tom Yum Goong
directions: Boil stock with lemongrass, lime leaves, and galangal for 10 minutes.
Add mushrooms and shrimp; cook until shrimp turn pink.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice; add chili paste if desired.
image_description: The image depicts a bowl of Tom Yum Goong, a Thai soup made with shrimp, mushrooms, and various spices. The dish is presented in a white ceramic bowl, garnished with fresh cilantro, lime wedges, and red chili peppers, and served with a side of chili flakes or sauce. The portion size appears to be a single serving, likely intended for one person.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
directions: Grill or pan-sear chicken; slice.
Toss lettuce with dressing and croutons.
Top with chicken slices and parmesan.
image_description: The image presents a Chicken Caesar Salad, featuring grilled chicken breast sliced into thin strips and placed atop a bed of romaine lettuce. The salad is generously topped with croutons, halved cherry tomatoes, shaved parmesan cheese, and a creamy Caesar dressing. The portion size appears to be a single serving, presented in a bowl with a dark rim and light interior, accompanied by a fork on the left side of the frame.

name: Moussaka
ingredients: Bechamel sauce: butter, flour, milk, nutmeg
directions: Roast eggplant slices until tender.
Cook lamb with onion and garlic; add tomatoes and season.
Layer eggplant and meat mixture in dish; top with bechamel.
Bake until golden and set.
image_description: The image depicts a delectable dish of Moussaka, a traditional Greek recipe, presented in a rectangular baking pan. The Moussaka is composed of layers of eggplant slices, rich meat sauce, and melted cheese, showcasing a harmonious blend of flavors and textures. The dish is surrounded by an assortment of ingredients, including tomatoes, onions, spices, and seasonings, which are likely used in its preparation.

name: Shoyu Ramen (Quick)
directions: Simmer broth with soy sauce and miso.
Cook noodles separately.
Assemble bowls with broth, noodles, meat, egg, and green onions.
image_description: The image depicts a steaming bowl of Shoyu Ramen, featuring springy noodles submerged in a rich, savory broth. The dish is garnished with sliced pork, green onions, black sesame seeds, and a halved soft-boiled egg, all arranged artfully within a black ceramic bowl. The portion size appears generous, suggesting a satisfying and filling meal.

name: Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta
directions: Cook pasta until al dente.
Sauté garlic in olive oil; add shrimp until pink.
Toss with pasta, lemon zest/juice, and parsley.
Season and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta, featuring cooked shrimp, fettuccine noodles, and green beans in a light sauce, garnished with lemon slices. The dish is presented on a large, shallow ceramic plate, surrounded by ingredients such as lemons, garlic cloves, salt, and pepper, suggesting a homemade preparation method. The portion size appears generous, suitable for one or two servings.

name: Ratatouille
directions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add vegetables; cook slowly with herbs until tender.
Season and serve warm or room temp.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and colorful dish of Ratatouille, a traditional French vegetable stew originating from Nice. The stew is presented in a white bowl, filled with an assortment of sliced vegetables including zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and bell peppers, showcasing a medley of colors and textures. The dish is garnished with fresh herbs and accompanied by various ingredients and seasonings, such as salt, pepper, and chili peppers, arranged around the bowl on a wooden cutting board.

name: Crispy Skin Salmon with Dill Yogurt
directions: Season salmon; sear skin-side down in butter until crisp.
Flip and cook to desired doneness.
Mix yogurt with dill and a squeeze of lemon; serve with salmon.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of pan-seared salmon fillets, seasoned with pepper and herbs, served with a side of dill-infused yogurt sauce and lemon wedges. The dish is presented on a rustic ceramic plate, accompanied by a fork and knife with ivory handles, and garnished with fresh dill sprigs and a sprinkle of spices. The portion size appears to be two servings, with two salmon fillets and a generous helping of yogurt sauce.

name: Thai Green Curry with Vegetables
ingredients: Assorted vegetables (bell peppers, zucchini, snow peas)
directions: Sauté curry paste briefly in oil.
Add coconut milk and simmer 5 minutes.
Add protein and vegetables; cook until tender.
Season with fish sauce and garnish with herbs; serve over rice.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing Thai Green Curry with Vegetables, served in a large bowl. The dish features a medley of colorful vegetables, including zucchini, bell peppers, and snow peas, alongside cubed tofu, all cooked in a rich and creamy green curry sauce and accompanied by a side of white rice. The presentation is visually appealing, with the ingredients arranged artfully in the bowl and garnished with fresh basil leaves, suggesting a generous portion size suitable for one or two servings.

name: Mango Sticky Rice
directions: Cook rice in water until tender.
Warm coconut milk with sugar and salt.
Pour coconut sauce over cooked rice and let absorb.
Serve with mango slices.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of Mango Sticky Rice, showcasing the key ingredients and preparation method. The presentation features a bowl of sticky rice topped with diced mango and a sprinkle of green leaves, accompanied by a side of fresh mango slices and a small bowl of sauce or dressing. The portion size appears to be a single serving, with the ingredients artfully arranged on a blue plate.

name: Herbed Quinoa Salad
ingredients: Lemon vinaigrette: lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper
directions: Cook quinoa in water until fluffy; cool.
Toss with vegetables, herbs, and vinaigrette.
Chill 10 minutes before serving if desired.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant Herbed Quinoa Salad, presented in a white ceramic bowl with a brown rim. The salad consists of cooked quinoa mixed with sliced cucumbers, halved cherry tomatoes, and chopped parsley, showcasing a fresh and healthy culinary creation. The dish is garnished with a sprinkle of quinoa and peppercorns around the bowl, accompanied by lemon wedges and a small bowl of olive oil on the side, indicating a light and refreshing dressing.

name: Beef Shawarma Wrap
directions: Marinate beef with shawarma spices.
Cook beef in a hot pan until done.
Fill pitas with beef and vegetables; drizzle with sauce.
image_description: The image depicts a Beef Shawarma Wrap, showcasing thinly sliced beef, crisp lettuce, juicy tomatoes, crunchy cucumbers, and onions, all wrapped in a warm pita bread. The dish is presented with various accompaniments, including sauces and spices, on a dark surface. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting a satisfying and filling meal.

name: Pesto Chicken Bake
directions: Season chicken and place in baking dish.
Top each with pesto, mozzarella, and tomatoes.
Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 22-25 minutes until chicken is cooked.
image_description: The image depicts a Pesto Chicken Bake, featuring four seared chicken breasts atop a bed of pasta, mozzarella cheese, and pesto sauce, garnished with cherry tomatoes. The dish is presented in a white baking dish on a wooden table, accompanied by a spoonful of pesto and utensils, suggesting a serving size for four people. The overall presentation is visually appealing, with the golden-brown chicken and vibrant colors of the tomatoes and pesto creating an appetizing display.

name: Baked Eggplant Parmesan
directions: Dip eggplant slices in egg then breadcrumbs; bake until tender.
Layer with marinara and cheese; bake until golden.
image_description: The image presents a delectable Baked Eggplant Parmesan, showcasing a harmonious blend of ingredients and cooking techniques. The dish features breaded and baked eggplant slices layered with tomato sauce and cheese, presented in a rectangular baking pan on a wooden cutting board. The surrounding ingredients, including fresh tomatoes, onions, garlic, parsley, and grated cheese, suggest a generous portion size suitable for serving multiple people.

name: Moroccan Chickpea Stew
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add spices.
Add chickpeas and tomatoes; simmer 15-20 minutes.
Garnish with cilantro and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a bowl of Moroccan Chickpea Stew, also known as "Chakchouka," presented in a decorative ceramic bowl. The stew is made with chickpeas, diced tomatoes, and fresh cilantro, and is likely cooked in a tomato-based broth flavored with spices. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting a hearty and satisfying meal.

name: Crunchy Cabbage Slaw
directions: Mix dressing ingredients.
Toss with shredded cabbage and carrot.
Chill slightly before serving.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant Crunchy Cabbage Slaw, showcasing its ingredients and preparation. The slaw is presented in a large blue bowl, comprising shredded green cabbage, carrots, black sesame seeds, and a creamy dressing, likely mayonnaise or sour cream-based, with visible seasonings. The portion size appears generous, suggesting a serving for multiple people.

name: Ceviche de Pescado
directions: Cure fish in lime juice for about 10-15 minutes until opaque.
Mix with onion, chili, and cilantro; season and serve.
image_description:
The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of Ceviche de Pescado, a traditional Peruvian raw fish dish. 
The bowl contains diced raw white fish marinated in lime juice, mixed with sliced red onions, halved red chili peppers, and garnished with cilantro leaves and a lime wedge. 
The presentation is visually appealing, with the ingredients arranged artfully in a ceramic bowl on a wooden cutting board, surrounded by additional chili peppers, lime halves, and a red onion slice.

name: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Krapow Gai)
directions: Sauté garlic and chili in oil until fragrant.
Add chicken and cook through.
Stir in soy and fish sauces; toss with basil until wilted.
Serve over steamed rice.
image_description: The image depicts a dish of Thai Basil Chicken, also known as Pad Krapow Gai, presented on a white plate with a blue patterned rim. The main ingredients visible are chicken, Thai basil leaves, red chili peppers, and garlic, all stir-fried in a savory sauce and served alongside a generous portion of white rice. The presentation style is simple yet appetizing, with the ingredients arranged artfully on the plate and accompanied by additional seasonings and garnishes around the dish.

name: Caprese Salad
directions: Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices on a plate.
Top with basil; drizzle olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Season with salt and pepper.
image_description: The image depicts a Caprese salad, consisting of sliced tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, and basil leaves, arranged on a white plate. The ingredients are dressed with olive oil and balsamic glaze, and the dish is presented in a casual yet elegant style, with a fork placed to the right of the plate. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting that it is intended for one or two people.

name: Pumpkin Risotto
directions: Sauté onion in olive oil until translucent.
Add rice and toast 1-2 minutes.
Add warm broth gradually, stirring until absorbed.
Stir in pumpkin puree, butter, and parmesan; season to taste.
image_description: The image depicts a large pan of risotto, with various ingredients arranged around it. The risotto is cooked in a black pan and features a mix of Arborio rice, diced pumpkin, thinly sliced red onions, and a pat of butter, with a spoon resting on top. The surrounding ingredients include whole and halved pumpkins, shallots, garlic cloves, salt, butter chunks, and a small bowl of olive oil, all presented on a dark gray surface.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
directions: Melt butter; add garlic and cook 1 minute.
Add shrimp; cook until pink.
Squeeze lemon juice; garnish with parsley and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a skillet of Garlic Butter Shrimp, showcasing succulent shrimp cooked in a rich garlic butter sauce and garnished with parsley. The dish is presented in a black skillet on a wooden tray, accompanied by a side of garlic cloves, lemon wedges, and a small bowl of melted butter. The portion size appears to be generous, suitable for two to three people.

name: Roasted Red Pepper Hummus
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve with pita or veggies.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of roasted red pepper hummus, presented in a dark bowl on a wooden table. The hummus is garnished with a spiral pattern of olive oil, red chili peppers, chickpeas, and spices, showcasing its creamy texture and flavorful ingredients. The surrounding elements, including pita bread, fresh peppers, garlic cloves, and various seasonings, suggest that this is a serving for multiple people or a generous portion for one person.

name: Garlic Naan
directions: Mix ingredients to form dough; knead until smooth.
Let rise 1 hour; divide and roll into rounds.
Cook on hot skillet 2-3 minutes per side.
Brush with garlic butter and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of Garlic Naan, a type of Indian flatbread. The naan is cooked to a golden brown and topped with garlic cloves, herbs, and a drizzle of oil, arranged in a circular pattern on a gray plate with a small bowl of garlic butter at the center. The portion size appears to be generous, with five pieces of naan served alongside a fork and knife.

name: Butter Chicken
directions: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add chicken and cook until sealed.
Stir in tomato sauce and garam masala; simmer 15 minutes.
Stir in cream; season and serve with rice or naan.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant dish of Butter Chicken, characterized by tender chicken cubes and onions in a rich, red sauce, garnished with fresh herbs. The cooking method appears to be a slow-cooked or braised technique, resulting in a deep, intense flavor profile. The presentation is elegant, with the dish served in a blue bowl against a dark background, suggesting a generous portion size suitable for a satisfying meal.

name: Coconut Curry Lentil Soup
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add curry powder.
Add lentils, coconut milk, and broth; simmer 25 minutes.
Season and serve hot.
image_description: The image depicts a steaming bowl of Coconut Curry Lentil Soup, garnished with red chili peppers and onions, and served in a dark brown ceramic bowl. The soup is surrounded by various ingredients, including turmeric powder, whole lentils, and lemon halves, suggesting a traditional Indian-inspired recipe. The presentation style is rustic and earthy, with the bowl placed on a wooden cutting board amidst scattered lentils and spices, indicating a generous portion size.

name: Gyro Wrap
ingredients: Gyro meat (lamb or chicken) or substitute with sliced chicken
directions: Cook gyro meat until browned.
Warm pita; fill with meat and vegetables.
Top with tzatziki.
image_description: The image depicts a Gyro Wrap, a traditional Greek dish, presented on a wooden cutting board. The wrap consists of thinly sliced meat, likely lamb or beef, accompanied by sliced tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, and a dollop of tzatziki sauce, all wrapped in a warm pita bread. The portion size appears to be generous, with the wrap being partially unwrapped to reveal its contents.

name: Pollo a la Brasa (Peruvian Roast Chicken)
directions: Marinate chicken with garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Roast at 200°C (400°F) for 40-45 minutes until cooked.
Serve with lime wedges.
image_description: The image depicts a whole roasted chicken, likely Pollo a la Brasa, arranged on a large clay platter and garnished with lime wedges and spices. The chicken is cooked to perfection, with a golden-brown color and visible seasoning. The dish is presented in a family-style serving, suggesting it is intended for multiple people.

name: Mango Salsa Chicken
directions: Season chicken and sear in a pan.
Top with mango salsa (mango, onion, cilantro, lime juice).
Bake 10 minutes to finish cooking.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of four grilled chicken breasts, each topped with a vibrant mango salsa and accompanied by lime wedges. The chicken is cooked to perfection, featuring visible grill marks, and is served on a white plate with a brown rim, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves. The portion size appears generous, suggesting a satisfying meal for multiple people.

name: Rice Paper Rolls with Peanut Dip
directions: Soak rice papers; fill with noodles, greens, and protein.
Roll tightly; serve with peanut dip.
image_description:

The rolls are arranged on a round wicker platter, surrounded by ingredients such as lettuce leaves, sliced cucumbers, shredded carrots, rice noodles, and cooked shrimp. 
The presentation is visually appealing, with the ingredients artfully arranged to showcase the freshness and variety of the components.

name: Beef Nachos
directions: Cook beef with seasoning.
Layer chips, beef, and cheese; bake until cheese melts.
Top with beans, salsa, sour cream, and jalapenos.
image_description: The image depicts a platter of beef nachos, featuring tortilla chips topped with seasoned ground beef, refried beans, melted cheese, sliced jalapeños, and sour cream. The dish is presented on a large metal platter, surrounded by various accompaniments such as salsa, shredded cheese, and additional jalapeños, all arranged on a rustic wooden table. The overall presentation suggests a casual, shareable snack or appetizer, likely intended for a group of people.

name: Herbed Chicken Skewers
directions: Thread chicken onto skewers after marinating briefly.
Grill until cooked through, basting with oil and herbs.
Serve with lemon wedges.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of grilled chicken skewers, garnished with rosemary and served with lemon wedges. The portion size appears to be moderate, suitable for one or two servings.

name: Coconut Shrimp Curry
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add curry powder.
Add coconut milk and vegetables; simmer 10 minutes.
Add shrimp; cook until pink and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant Coconut Shrimp Curry dish, presented in a large skillet and surrounded by various ingredients. The curry is cooked with succulent shrimp, onions, bell peppers, and green chilies, all simmered in a rich coconut milk-based sauce. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting a hearty serving for multiple people.

name: Herbed Mushroom Risotto
directions: Sauté onion and mushrooms; add rice and toast.

image_description: The image presents a delectable serving of Herbed Mushroom Risotto, artfully arranged in a brown ceramic bowl. The generous portion is elegantly presented on a gray table, surrounded by an assortment of ingredients and condiments, including olive oil, herbs, and additional Parmesan cheese, highlighting the culinary craftsmanship that has gone into preparing this satisfying meal.

name: Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
directions: Mix all ingredients into a smooth batter.
Cook on a hot skillet until bubbles form; flip and cook through.
image_description: The image depicts a tray of ingredients and a finished dish, likely Lemon Ricotta Pancakes. The presentation style is visually appealing, with the ingredients arranged around the pancake on a metal tray, suggesting a recipe or cooking demonstration.

name: Egg Fried Rice
directions: Scramble eggs in a wok; set aside.

Season with soy sauce and scallions.
image_description: The image depicts a large skillet filled with Egg Fried Rice, featuring a generous serving for four people. The dish is cooked to perfection and garnished with four fried eggs, peas, carrots, and green onions, presented in a rustic cast-iron skillet. The skillet is accompanied by two small bowls of soy sauce and utensils, suggesting a casual yet satisfying meal.

name: Okonomiyaki (Japanese Pancake)
directions: Mix batter with cabbage.
Cook on a griddle; top with meat and flip.
Brush with sauce and drizzle with mayo.
image_description: The image depicts a savory Japanese pancake, known as Okonomiyaki, presented on a large white plate. The pancake is topped with shrimp, mayonnaise, and a sweet sauce, and is accompanied by three small bowls containing additional condiments. The dish is served on a wooden table, suggesting a casual dining setting.

name: Herb-Ceta Pasta with Lemon
directions: Cook pasta; reserve some pasta water.
Toss with lemon zest, juice, herbs, and olive oil.
Add a splash of pasta water; finish with parmesan.
image_description: The image depicts a bowl of pasta, likely penne, tossed in a vibrant green herb sauce and topped with grated Parmesan cheese, fresh basil leaves, and sliced lemons. The dish is presented in a shallow, wide ceramic bowl on a wooden board, accompanied by a fork to the left. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting a satisfying meal for one person.

name: Coconut Rice with Beans
directions: Simmer coconut milk with garlic powder; stir in beans and cilantro.
Serve over rice.
image_description: The image depicts a bowl of Coconut Rice with Beans, showcasing a harmonious blend of ingredients. The dish features a medley of black beans, white rice, and various spices, including chili peppers and herbs, all combined in a creamy coconut milk sauce. The presentation is visually appealing, with the ingredients arranged artfully around the central bowl, suggesting a generous portion size suitable for serving multiple people.

name: Baked Cod with Tomato and Olive
directions: Place cod in baking dish; top with tomatoes, olives, and garlic.
Drizzle with olive oil; bake at 200°C (400°F) for 12-15 minutes.
Garnish with parsley.
image_description: The image depicts a baked cod fillet, seasoned with herbs and topped with a mixture of diced tomatoes and olives, served on a plate surrounded by halved cherry tomatoes, green and black olives, and garlic cloves in a savory broth. The dish is presented in a rustic, earthy style, with the plate placed on a wooden board and accompanied by a knife and fork. The portion size appears to be a single serving, suggesting an individual meal.

name: Seared Tuna Niçoise
directions: Sear tuna to desired doneness.
Boil beans and potatoes; assemble with eggs and olives.

image_description: The image depicts a Seared Tuna Niçoise salad, featuring seared tuna steaks, green beans, boiled potatoes, hard-boiled eggs, and olives, all arranged on a plate with a fork and knife on either side. name: Harissa Chickpea Bowl
directions: Roast chickpeas with harissa 15-20 minutes.

image_description: The image depicts a vibrant Harissa Chickpea Bowl, featuring a generous serving of chickpeas in a rich harissa sauce atop a bed of couscous. name: Salmon with Dill and Mustard Glaze
directions: Mix glaze with mustard, dill, and honey.

image_description: The image depicts two salmon fillets, cooked to a pinkish-orange hue and glazed with a mixture of mustard, herbs, and spices, presented on a dark baking sheet. name: Butter Lettuce Salad with Avocado
directions: Toss greens with avocado and tomatoes.

image_description: The image depicts a vibrant salad comprising butter lettuce, halved cherry tomatoes, and diced avocado, presented in a white ceramic bowl with a brown rim. name: Eggplant Caponata
directions: Sauté eggplant until soft.

Serve warm or at room temperature.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of Eggplant Caponata, a traditional Sicilian relish. The dish is garnished with fresh parsley and accompanied by a wooden spoon on the side, suggesting a generous serving size for 4-6 people.

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
directions: Toast bread; mash avocado with lemon, salt, and pepper.
Poach eggs; place on toast and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of avocado toast with poached eggs, featuring toasted bread topped with mashed avocado, sliced avocado, and two poached eggs. The dish is garnished with salt, pepper, and lemon wedges, and is presented on a white plate with a knife and additional ingredients surrounding it. The portion size appears to be a single serving, likely intended for one person.

name: Herbed Tomato Soup
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add tomatoes and broth.

Stir in cream and herbs; season and serve.

The presentation suggests a recipe for four servings, with a cooking time of 20-24 minutes.

name: Pesto Gnocchi with Cherry Tomatoes
directions: Boil gnocchi until floating; drain.
Toss with pesto and halved tomatoes; top with parmesan.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of pesto gnocchi with cherry tomatoes, showcasing a harmonious blend of ingredients and presentation. name: Paneer Butter Fry
directions: Sauté onion in butter; add paneer and brown.

name: Lemon Garlic Roasted Brussels Sprouts
directions: Toss sprouts with oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.

name: Paneer Tarsi with Spinach
directions: Sauté onion and tomato; add spices.

The main components include paneer (Indian cheese), spinach leaves, cherry tomatoes, and onions, all expertly sautéed in a large pan. name: Rendang Beef
directions: Simmer beef with coconut milk and rendang paste with aromatics until tender and thickened.
image_description: The image depicts a large bowl of Rendang Beef, a traditional Malaysian dish, surrounded by various ingredients and spices. name: Chili Con Carne

image_description: The image presents a vibrant and appetizing dish of Moroccan Lentil Soup (Harira), showcasing a medley of ingredients including chickpeas, tomatoes, onions, and spices. The presentation style is visually appealing, with a focus on highlighting the diverse components that make up this traditional Moroccan recipe.

name: Thai Red Curry with Chicken
directions: Sauté curry paste in oil; add chicken to sear.

name: Pasta Arrabbiata
directions: Cook pasta until al dente.

image_description: The image depicts a bowl of Pasta Arrabbiata, characterized by its vibrant red sauce and generous portion size. name: Cranberry Walnut Salad
directions: Toss greens with cranberries, walnuts, and cheese.

name: Eggplant Yakitori Skewers

name: Chana Masala
directions: Sauté onion and garlic; add spices.
Add tomatoes and chickpeas; simmer 15-20 minutes.

name: Buttermilk Pancakes
directions: Mix dry ingredients; whisk in wet ingredients until smooth.
Cook on a hot skillet until bubbles form; flip and cook through.

directions: Form patties and brown in a pan; set aside.

directions: Grill corn until charred; brush with butter.

name: Herbed Rice with Peas
directions: Cook rice with peas; stir in greens and butter.
image_description: The image depicts a bowl of herbed rice with peas, surrounded by various ingredients and cooking essentials. name: Herbed Shrimp and Grits

name: Duck Confit (Simple Version)
ingredients: Duck legs confit (or duck legs and fat)
directions: Crisp duck skin in a hot skillet; finish in oven until skin is golden and meat is tender.
image_description: The image depicts a dish of two duck legs, likely confit, presented in a dark-colored pan with a rich, savory sauce and garnished with herbs and garlic cloves. The cooking method appears to be slow-cooking or braising, as evidenced by the tender meat and flavorful sauce. The portion size is moderate, suggesting a serving for one or two people.

name: Lemon Olive Oil Cake
directions: Mix ingredients; bake in loaf pan until a toothpick comes out clean.
image_description: The image depicts a lemon olive oil cake, showcasing its ingredients and preparation method. The cake is presented in a loaf pan with one slice removed, accompanied by a bowl of olive oil, lemons, and other ingredients such as flour, sugar, eggs, and lemon zest. The presentation style features the cake on a light-colored surface, surrounded by the ingredients, with labels pointing to each component, indicating a portion size of one slice.

name: Salsa Verde Chicken Tajine
directions: Combine ingredients in a tajine or pot; simmer until chicken is cooked and flavors meld.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and flavorful Salsa Verde Chicken Tajine, showcasing tender chicken pieces cooked in a rich, green sauce with an assortment of vegetables and chickpeas. The dish is presented in a traditional clay pot, garnished with fresh herbs and olives, and appears to be a generous serving for four to six people. The overall presentation suggests a hearty, slow-cooked meal that is both nourishing and visually appealing.

name: Coconut Lime Chicken
directions: Sauté garlic and curry paste; add chicken and coconut milk.
Simmer until chicken is cooked; finish with lime juice.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of Coconut Lime Chicken, presented in a gray ceramic bowl. The chicken is cooked in a rich yellow coconut milk sauce, garnished with an assortment of ingredients including sliced limes, red chili peppers, shallots, garlic cloves, and fresh cilantro leaves. The dish is served family-style, with a generous portion size that suggests it is intended for multiple people to share.

name: Spinach and Feta Stuffed Peppers
directions: Cook filling with spinach and feta; stuff peppers.
Bake in sauce until peppers tender.
image_description: The image depicts a cast-iron skillet containing five stuffed peppers, with three green and two yellow, filled with a mixture of rice, spinach, and feta cheese, baked in a tomato-based sauce. The dish is presented in a rustic, homemade style, with the peppers arranged in a circular pattern within the skillet. The portion size appears to be moderate, suggesting a main course or substantial side dish serving four to six people.

name: Gado-Gado (Indonesian Peanut Salad)
ingredients: Peanut sauce: peanuts, palm sugar, tamarind, lime
directions: Arrange vegetables, eggs, and tofu on a plate.
Drizzle with warm peanut sauce and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and nutritious Gado-Gado, an Indonesian peanut salad, presented on a large, shallow ceramic plate with a brown rim and blue-green interior. The dish is composed of an assortment of fresh vegetables, including green beans, carrots, cabbage, bean sprouts, and red peppers, accompanied by cubed tofu, chickpeas, boiled egg halves, and peanuts, all arranged artfully around a central peanut sauce. The generous portion is garnished with fresh mint leaves and served on a gray cloth napkin, suggesting a healthy and satisfying meal.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
ingredients: 1 tablespoon cornstarch mixed with 1 tablespoon water
directions: In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar to make the sauce.
Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the chicken until cooked through; remove and set aside.
In the same wok, sauté garlic, ginger, and dried chilies until fragrant.
Return chicken to the wok, add the peanuts and the sauce mixture.
Stir in the cornstarch slurry and cook until the sauce thickens and coats the chicken.
Serve hot with steamed rice.
image_description: The image presents a Kung Pao chicken dish, characterized by its vibrant red and brown hues, in a large wok. The chicken is cooked with visible ingredients such as peanuts, red chilies, and garlic, suggesting a stir-frying method. The presentation style is casual, with the wok centered on a dark surface surrounded by various ingredients and seasonings, indicating a generous portion size suitable for multiple servings.

name: Mapo Tofu
directions: Brown the ground meat in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the spicy bean paste and peppercorns, stirring until fragrant and the oil turns red.
Pour in the chicken broth and soy sauce; bring to a simmer.
Gently add the tofu cubes and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the cornstarch slurry to thicken the sauce.
Garnish with green onions and serve.
image_description: The image depicts a large skillet filled with Mapo Tofu, a traditional Sichuan dish. The tofu is cooked in a savory sauce with ground meat and scallions, and the dish is presented in a rustic cooking vessel, suggesting a homemade or casual dining setting. The portion size appears generous, indicating that it is likely intended for multiple servings.

name: Beef and Broccoli
ingredients: 300g flank steak, thinly sliced against the grain
directions: Toss beef slices with cornstarch and a splash of soy sauce; let sit for 10 minutes.
Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 2 minutes, then drain.
Heat oil in a wok and sear beef at high heat until browned; remove.
Stir-fry ginger for 30 seconds, then add broccoli, oyster sauce, and soy sauce.
Return beef to the wok and toss everything together for 1 minute.
Serve immediately.
image_description: The image depicts a vibrant and appetizing dish of beef and broccoli, presented in a large wok or skillet. The ingredients include sliced beef, steamed broccoli, cashews, and various seasonings, all stir-fried together in a savory sauce. The portion size appears to be generous, suggesting a hearty serving for one or two people.

name: General Tso's Chicken
ingredients: 500g chicken thighs, cut into bite-sized pieces
directions: Coat chicken pieces thoroughly in cornstarch.
Deep fry chicken in hot oil until crispy and golden; drain on paper towels.
In a separate pan, sauté ginger, garlic, and chilies.
Add soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar; simmer until the sugar dissolves.
Toss the crispy chicken into the sauce until fully coated.
Serve over white rice.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of General Tso's Chicken, a popular Chinese-American dish. The chicken is deep-fried and coated in a sweet and spicy sauce, served with steamed white rice and garnished with sliced red chilies and sesame seeds. The generous portion is presented in a brown ceramic bowl, accompanied by chopsticks on the side.

name: Pork Potstickers (Dumplings)
directions: Mix pork, cabbage, soy sauce, sesame oil, and ginger in a bowl.
Place a teaspoon of filling in the center of a wrapper, moisten edges, and fold/pleat to seal.
Heat oil in a flat skillet and arrange dumplings in a single layer.
Fry for 2 minutes until bottoms are golden.
Pour in water and immediately cover with a lid to steam for 5-7 minutes.
Remove lid and cook until water evaporates and bottoms are crispy again.
image_description: The image depicts a serving of pan-fried pork potstickers, also known as dumplings or gyoza, arranged in a cast-iron skillet. The dumplings are golden brown on the bottom and topped with sesame seeds, accompanied by a small bowl of dipping sauce containing soy sauce and sesame seeds, served with a wooden spoon. The presentation is casual yet appetizing, with the dumplings served in a generous portion, likely intended for sharing among multiple people.

name: Hot and Sour Soup
directions: Bring broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add tofu, bamboo shoots, soy sauce, and white pepper.
Stir in the cornstarch slurry and simmer until thickened.
Slowly drizzle in the beaten egg while stirring gently to create ribbons.
Stir in the rice vinegar at the very end to preserve the 'sour' punch.
Garnish with green onions.
image_description: The image depicts a large pot of hot and sour soup, filled with various ingredients including tofu, bamboo shoots, noodles, and green onions. The soup is presented in a black pot with two handles, accompanied by several bowls of additional ingredients such as eggs, chili sauce, and rice starter on the side. The overall presentation suggests a hearty and flavorful dish, likely served family-style or for multiple people.

name: Chow Mein
directions: Boil noodles according to package instructions, drain, and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry cabbage and carrots for 3 minutes.
Add the noodles to the wok.
Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sugar, then pour over the noodles.
Toss at high heat for 2-3 minutes until noodles are slightly charred and well coated.
Serve hot.
image_description: The image depicts a plate of Chow Mein, a Chinese stir-fry dish made with noodles and vegetables. The dish is presented on a large, round ceramic plate, featuring a medley of ingredients including noodles, broccoli, carrots, cabbage, peas, and bell peppers, all cooked to perfection through stir-frying. The generous portion is accompanied by two small bowls containing soy sauce and sesame seeds, as well as a pair of chopsticks, suggesting a satisfying and filling meal.

name: Wonton Soup
directions: Bring chicken broth and soy sauce to a boil in a pot.
Add the wontons and simmer for 5 minutes (or until they float).
Add bok choy and cook for 1 minute until wilted.
Turn off heat and stir in sesame oil.
Ladle into bowls and garnish with green onions.
image_description: The image depicts a culinary arrangement of wonton soup, showcasing three bowls filled with wontons and green onions in a clear broth. The bowls are accompanied by various ingredients and seasonings, including soy sauce, sesame oil, and chopped scallions, which are neatly arranged on a wooden tray. The portion size appears to be moderate, with each bowl containing four to five wontons, suggesting a serving for one person.

name: Honey Walnut Shrimp
directions: Dip shrimp in egg, then coat with cornstarch.
Fry shrimp in hot oil until golden and crispy; drain.
In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, honey, and condensed milk.
Toss the warm shrimp and candied walnuts into the sauce until evenly coated.
Serve immediately, usually garnished with steamed broccoli.
image_description: The image depicts a dish of Honey Walnut Shrimp, featuring large shrimp coated in a sweet sauce and accompanied by broccoli florets, walnuts, and quail eggs. The ingredients are arranged in a shallow blue ceramic bowl with a brown rim, suggesting a stir-fry cooking method. The portion size appears generous, with multiple servings of shrimp and accompanying vegetables.
